title: Better Bedwars: Reimagined
description: A remix of Better Bedwars with a slightly different style.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a71ea8f120592508d880ad2305882c5cebc1c856_0.webp)

---

### About
Reimagined is a remixed version of the original PVP texture pack [BetterBedwars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterbedwars) by [ColinMcCloud](https://modrinth.com/user/ColinMcCloud). Reimagined introduces simple minimalist textures into the game to improve your PVP experience, while keeping the original sound from BetterBedwars.

---

### How is Reimagined different from other PVP texture packs?
Reimagined is designed to have a completely different feel to texture packs where it is clean and minimalistic, while keeping it true to minecraft and not feel completely different to the base game.

---

### Requirements

Optine is required if you want some changes to be made such as the XP text colour and the improved skyboxes. Everything else will work in vanilla Minecraft.

[![Optifine Downloads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f40a3d7685bd05ec385c82028d09f8d9fc06e35a.webp)](https://optifine.net/downloads)

### Credits
Thank you to [ColinMcCloud](https://modrinth.com/user/ColinMcCloud) for allowing me to create and publish this, not only did he allow me to remix it, but he helped me with suggestions and improvements as well as some other cool stuff. Make sure to try out the original [Better Bedwars.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterbedwars) as well to see which version you like best! 

[![Better Bedwars. Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbe094d25119afb2180bbe914db9263a12ae89a7.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterbedwars)

![Terms Of Use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc043783537c3418cc4ad3f797e7a8d4484d4428.webp)



With this texture pack, YOU MAY:

- Modify the texture pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly.
- Include this texture pack in your mod pack or server.
- Use this texture pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, and blog posts (with appropriate credit; preferably including its name and a link to the official Modrinth page by putting it in the description or by leaving a pinned comment).
- Use an edited version of this texture pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, and blog posts (the same terms regarding appropriate credit apply here as well).


With this texture pack, YOU MAY NOT:

- Redistribute this texture pack
- Include unedited assets in your own texture pack, unless you have permission from the creator
- Earn money using remixed, transformed, and built-upon assets in your own texture pack.
- Include assets from this texture pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator (ColinMcCloud).
